name: IdsEdwBClmLnFLoad

text.value: WITH cte_source AS (SELECT * FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.randomTMP_IdsEdwBClmLnFLoad), cte_filter AS (SELECT * FROM cte_source WHERE dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = 'FACETS'), cte_dedup AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn FROM cte_filter), cte_final AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 0 AS CLM_LN_RVNU_CD_SK, CAST(0.00 AS decimal(38,2)) AS CLM_LN_CHRG_AMT, CAST(0.00 AS decimal(38,2)) AS CLM_LN_PAYBL_AMT, CAST(0.00 AS decimal(38,2)) AS CLM_LN_ALW_AMT, 0 AS CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK FROM cte_dedup WHERE rn=1) TRUNCATE TABLE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.B_CLM_LN_F; INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.B_CLM_LN_F (SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_LN_RVNU_CD_SK, CLM_LN_CHRG_AMT, CLM_LN_PAYBL_AMT, CLM_LN_ALW_AMT, CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_LN_RVNU_CD_SK, CLM_LN_CHRG_AMT, CLM_LN_PAYBL_AMT, CLM_LN_ALW_AMT, CLM_LN_PROC_CD_SK FROM cte_final

Annotations:
This Job loads CLM_LN_DSALW_F data into B_CLM_LN_F  to check for the updated CLM LN SK's.
Remove Duplicates based on Natural Keys
the daily load file created in Extract Job
Load daily file into B table.
